title: Trauma and PTSD - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about trauma and PTSD and find out what we're doing to address it. If you're in distress, please call or text 9-8-8. If this is an emergency, dial 9-1-1.

## Services and information
Learn about PTSD, its symptoms, and how common it is in Canada.
Learn how we’re helping to address PTSD.

### Get mental health support
Find mental health resources and help for PTSD.
